HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.title: Fans
HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, lose half your [gold]Fans[/gold], rounded up, unless you are [gold]Singing[/gold].
HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.smartDescription: Lose half at end of turn unless [gold]Singing[/gold].
HOLOGIRL-SINGING_POWER.title: Singing
HOLOGIRL-SINGING_POWER.description: [gold]Fans[/gold] do not decay at end of turn. Decreases by 1 at the start of your turn.
HOLOGIRL-SHAPESHIFT_POWER.title: Shapeshift
HOLOGIRL-SHAPESHIFT_POWER.description: Deferred prototype mechanic. This release does not use Shapeshift in Hologirl's active card pool.
HOLOGIRL-BROADCAST_LOOP_POWER.title: Broadcast Loop
HOLOGIRL-BROADCAST_LOOP_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Fans[/gold] equal to this power's amount.
HOLOGIRL-BROADCAST_LOOP_POWER.smartDescr: Gain [gold]Fans[/gold] at the start of your turn.
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAM_POWER.title: Livestream
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAM_POWER.description: When you use a Potion, fully block an attack, heal, apply a debuff, or deal 18+ unblocked damage with one hit, gain [gold]Fans[/gold] equal to this power's amount.
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAM_POWER.smartDescripti: Gain [gold]Fans[/gold] when you use a Potion, fully block, heal, apply a debuff, or land a big hit.
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAMPOWER.title: Livestream
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAMPOWER.description: When you use a Potion, fully block an attack, heal, apply a debuff, or deal 18+ unblocked damage with one hit, gain [gold]Fans[/gold] equal to this power's amount.
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAMPOWER.smartDescriptio: Gain [gold]Fans[/gold] when you use a Potion, fully block, heal, apply a debuff, or land a big hit.
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAM_POWER_POWER.title: Livestream
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAM_POWER_POWER.descript: When you use a Potion, fully block an attack, heal, apply a debuff, or deal 18+ unblocked damage with one hit, gain [gold]Fans[/gold] equal to this power's amount.
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAM_POWER_POWER.smartDes: Gain [gold]Fans[/gold] when you use a Potion, fully block, heal, apply a debuff, or land a big hit.
HOLOGIRL-FAUNA_FORM_POWER.title: Fauna Form
HOLOGIRL-FAUNA_FORM_POWER.description: A gentle nature idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
HOLOGIRL-AMELIA_FORM_POWER.title: Amelia Form
HOLOGIRL-AMELIA_FORM_POWER.description: A clever detective idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
HOLOGIRL-GURA_FORM_POWER.title: Gura Form
HOLOGIRL-GURA_FORM_POWER.description: A sharp shark idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
HOLOGIRL-KRONII_FORM_POWER.title: Kronii Form
HOLOGIRL-KRONII_FORM_POWER.description: A poised timekeeper idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
